title: Evolution Evidence
description: Evidence that justifies evolving an existing AISP skill. Scope creep beyond this evidence is forbidden.
$comment: CROSS-REF PRECISION (P6): every gaps[].evidence_ref MUST resolve to an item actually listed in one of the evidence arrays (execution_failures / eval_results / test_outcomes / newer_specs / human_feedback). JSON Schema 2020-12 cannot express this value-level resolvability inline; validate against this at runtime (gather_evidence.step2) so no gap cites phantom evidence — this guards against scope creep beyond the supplied evidence.

evidence_ref.$comment: MUST point to a concrete evidence item present in this object's evidence arrays; a non-resolvable evidence_ref signals scope creep and MUST be rejected.
